_comment: Dashboard content-worker appends generation entries here (no Python edits). Each entry: file, model, job, cost, batch, at, src, prompt, notes.

entries.prompt:
Authentic UGC iPhone arm's-length selfie, candid and unposed, natural soft morning daylight, no studio, no professional lighting, NOT retouched, natural skin texture, slightly imperfect handheld framing.
The woman from the reference image — keep her EXACT same face, long blonde hair, blue eyes, fair light skin and petite curvy figure — sipping iced coffee on a balcony in a sunny apartment balcony. She wears an oversized knit sweater. sleepy soft smile.
CLOSE waist-up selfie framing with her FACE LARGE, SHARP and clearly in focus. Vertical 9:16. No text.
entries.notes: dashboard queue row #1; 1k (resolution param not passed, defaulted); awaiting approval
